markdown:
#  Are accounting approvers notified when data is awaiting acceptance in the ERP Integrations tool? 
##  Answer 
Yes. Procore sends a daily automated email notification to all designated accounting approvers (see [What is the Accounting Approver role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-accounting-approver-role)) on a project. Sent during off-peak hours, the report alerts approvers which data is waiting in the ERP Integrations tool for review and requires an 'Accept' or 'Reject' response.
_Note:_ If an accounting approver initially submits a 'Reject' response, the system will NOT send an immediate automated email notification after the corrected information is sent to the ERP Integrations tool.
## See Also

title: Are accounting approvers notified when data is awaiting acceptance in the ERP Integrations tool?
